final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [1:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Off
    end else begin
        case (temperature)
            2'b00: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Off
            2'b01: fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Low
            2'b10: fan_speed <= 2'b10; // Medium
            2'b11: fan_speed <= 2'b11; // High
            default: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Default to Off
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
